topic: Dopamine's prefrontal cortex pathway — enhancing executive function
caption: Did you know dopamine is key to unlocking your brain's potential? 🧠💡 Dopamine regulates the prefrontal cortex, impacting executive function. Here are 3 ways to boost dopamine naturally: exercise, meditation, and adequate sleep. 💤🏋️‍♀️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future brain will thank you! 🙏
